f001_w004_material_replenishment.fasten_part_with_driver: a worker assembles a part using a driver tool
f001_w004_material_replenishment.pour_parts_from_bag: a worker turns a bag upside down and pours the parts out
f001_w004_material_replenishment.roll_empty_bag: a worker rolls up a bag

f001_w011_metal_stamping.feed_metal_strip_into_press: a worker feeds a long strip of metal into a press machine
f001_w011_metal_stamping.walk_to_next_press: a worker leaves one metal press and walks along the marked factory aisle to the neighboring press station
f001_w011_metal_stamping.pick_up_metal_sheets: a worker picks up metal sheets
f001_w011_metal_stamping.align_metal_sheet_stack: a worker aligns and gathers metal sheets

f002_w002_garment_bagging.pick_garment_from_stack: a worker grasps the top folded garment from a stack and lifts it away from the stack
f002_w002_garment_bagging.insert_garment_into_bag: a worker puts a folded garment into a plastic bag
f002_w002_garment_bagging.seal_bag_flap: after the garment is inside, a worker folds and presses the narrow adhesive edge of the clear plastic bag to seal it
f002_w002_garment_bagging.place_package_to_right: a worker lifts the finished sealed garment package from the table and carries it to the right

f002_w003_fabric_folding.take_garment_from_stack: a worker grasps the top light-blue folded garment and removes it from the stack
f002_w003_fabric_folding.fold_garment_sides: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-blue garment inward and straightens the folded garment on the table
f002_w003_fabric_folding.pick_up_hanger: a worker reaches to the pile of black clothes hangers on the left and lifts one black hanger

f002_w005_garment_ironing.place_folding_board: a worker places a white rectangular folding board in the center of a light-purple shirt and aligns the board with both hands
f002_w005_garment_ironing.fold_shirt_around_board: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-purple shirt inward around a white folding board
f002_w005_garment_ironing.turn_and_neaten_folded_shirt: a worker lifts the folded light-purple shirt, turns it over to the front, and straightens its shape with both hands
f002_w005_garment_ironing.stack_folded_shirt: a worker places the finished folded light-purple shirt on top of the completed stack at the upper side of the table

f003_w005_metal_casting.carry_casting_bundle: a worker carries a connected bundle of silver cast-metal parts by hand from the work table toward a wooden crate
f003_w005_metal_casting.put_casting_into_crate: a worker lowers the connected silver casting into the wooden crate directly in front of him
f003_w005_metal_casting.pick_up_hammer: after returning from the crate, a worker reaches to the work table and lifts the wooden-handled hammer with his right hand
f003_w005_metal_casting.hammer_casting: a worker repeatedly strikes silver cast-metal parts on the work table with a wooden-handled hammer

f003_w007_wax_pattern.clean_wax_cluster_with_rod: a worker cleans a cluster of small yellow wax parts using a thin handheld brush or rod
f003_w007_wax_pattern.mark_wax_cluster_with_white_tool: a worker makes a white mark on the small yellow wax part held in their hands
f003_w007_wax_pattern.place_wax_cluster_on_rack: a worker places the cluster of small yellow wax parts onto the tray filled with similar yellow parts

f003_w009_injection_molding.remove_yellow_parts_from_mold: a worker removes small yellow molded parts from the open metal mold and places them on the tray to the right
f003_w009_injection_molding.hold_metal_rod_at_mold: a worker picks up and holds a thin metal rod beside the open mold

f003_w010_mold_preparation.place_yellow_mold_plate_on_container: a worker places a yellow rectangular mold cover over the metal mold box

f004_w002_thread_trimming.trim_threads_with_snips: a worker uses blue-handled scissors to cut loose threads from a white garment on the table
f004_w002_thread_trimming.spread_white_garment_on_table: a worker unfolds and spreads a white garment flat on the work table

f004_w004_continuous_fabric.move_black_garment_to_upper_left: a worker lifts a black garment with both hands and moves it to the upper-left side of the worktable
f004_w004_continuous_fabric.spread_garment_in_front_of_sewing_machin: a worker pulls a black garment toward themselves with both hands and spreads it on the table in front of the sewing machine
f004_w004_continuous_fabric.align_garment_edge_layers: a worker pinches the edge of a black garment with both hands and aligns the overlapping fabric layers
f004_w004_continuous_fabric.feed_garment_edge_under_presser_foot: a worker feeds the aligned edge of a black garment under the sewing machine presser foot

f004_w005_heat_press.raise_heat_press_handle: a worker lifts the orange handle of the heat press and opens it
f004_w005_heat_press.remove_white_fabric_from_heat_press: a worker pulls a white fabric item out from under the open heat press
f004_w005_heat_press.separate_white_fabric_from_stack: a worker separates one white fabric item from the stack on the left and lifts it
f004_w005_heat_press.align_and_fold_white_fabric_on_table: a worker folds a white fabric item on the table with both hands

f004_w005_overlock_seaming.guide_pink_fabric_under_presser_foot: a worker feeds the edge of pink fabric under the sewing machine presser foot while guiding it with both hands
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.remove_pink_fabric_from_sewing_machine: a worker pulls pink fabric away from the sewing machine needle area and moves it aside
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.take_next_pink_fabric_from_pile: a worker reaches to the pile on the left and takes out the next piece of pink fabric
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.spread_and_align_pink_fabric_edges: a worker spreads a piece of pink fabric with both hands and follows its edge with their fingers to align the overlapping edges
f004_w005_overlock_seaming.position_pink_fabric_at_presser_foot: a worker brings the aligned edge of pink fabric to the sewing machine needle area and positions it at the presser foot

f004_w006_curvilinear_seam.align_curved_gray_fabric_edges: a worker pinches the curved edges of gray fabric with both hands and aligns the overlapping edges
f004_w006_curvilinear_seam.position_gray_fabric_at_presser_foot: a worker brings the aligned gray fabric edge to the sewing machine needle area and positions it under the presser foot
f004_w006_curvilinear_seam.guide_gray_fabric_under_presser_foot: a worker feeds the curved edge of gray fabric under the sewing machine presser foot while turning and guiding it with both hands

f004_w006_edge_binding.guide_gray_garment_bound_edge_under_pres: a worker feeds the navy-bound edge of a gray garment under the sewing machine presser foot and guides it with both hands
f004_w006_edge_binding.remove_gray_garment_from_sewing_machine: a worker pulls a gray garment toward themselves and away from the sewing machine needle area
f004_w006_edge_binding.trim_excess_navy_binding_with_scissors: a worker holds the edge of a gray garment with the left hand and uses large reddish-brown scissors in the right hand to cut the protruding navy binding
f004_w006_edge_binding.align_navy_bound_edge: a worker pinches the navy-bound edge of a gray garment with both hands and repeatedly repositions their fingers along the edge to straighten it
f004_w006_edge_binding.turn_and_spread_gray_garment: a worker turns a gray garment over with both hands and spreads it back out on the worktable
f004_w006_edge_binding.pull_loose_white_thread_from_seam: a worker pinches a loose white thread protruding from an inner seam of a gray garment and repeatedly pulls it toward themselves
f004_w006_edge_binding.position_gray_garment_edge_at_presser_fo: a worker brings the edge of a gray garment to the sewing machine needle area and positions it at the presser foot

f005_w001_semi_automatic.place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle: a worker places a ring-shaped part onto the central machine spindle
f005_w001_semi_automatic.arrange_white_cord_by_hand: a worker arranges the white cord on the ring-shaped part with both hands
f005_w001_semi_automatic.press_illuminated_control_switch: a worker presses the illuminated switch on the right control panel
f005_w001_semi_automatic.reach_and_return_with_black_tweezers: a worker reaches to the right and returns holding black tweezers
f005_w001_semi_automatic.position_black_tweezers_at_white_cord: a worker brings the black tweezers to the white cord on the ring part
f005_w001_semi_automatic.tuck_white_cord_with_black_tweezers: a worker tucks the white cord with black tweezers
f005_w001_semi_automatic.reach_toward_control_panel_top: a worker reaches the right hand toward the top of the control panel

f005_w010_manual_lathe.turn_center_hex_with_box_wrench: a worker steadies a circular metal fixture on the lathe spindle with the left hand and repeatedly turns its center hex using a silver box-end wrench in the right hand
f005_w010_manual_lathe.place_box_wrench_on_carriage: a worker removes a silver box-end wrench from the center hex on the lathe spindle and places the wrench on the carriage to the right
f005_w010_manual_lathe.press_left_lathe_control: a worker presses the red-and-white square control below the lathe spindle with the left hand
f005_w010_manual_lathe.operate_front_carriage_handle: a worker grips and operates the large black handwheel on the front side of the lathe carriage with the left hand

f005_w011_cnc_machine.carry_square_fixture_to_cnc_opening: a worker carries a square metal fixture with an orange face and central hole in the right hand while walking to the open CNC machine
f005_w011_cnc_machine.position_square_fixture_inside_cnc: a worker presses a square metal fixture against the vertical mounting area inside the CNC machine and adjusts its position with the right hand
f005_w011_cnc_machine.press_illuminated_orange_control: a worker presses the illuminated orange round button on the CNC machine control panel with the left hand
f005_w011_cnc_machine.press_lower_right_silver_control: a worker presses the silver round button at the lower-right of the CNC machine control panel with the left hand
f005_w011_cnc_machine.close_cnc_sliding_door: a worker grips the black vertical handle of the CNC machine with the left hand and closes the sliding door
f005_w011_cnc_machine.move_orange_square_fixture_on_table: a worker lifts an orange square metal fixture from the worktable with the right hand, moves it to the adjacent position, and sets it down

f006_w004_bulk_material.move_ribbed_cylinder_to_orange_cart: a worker lifts a hollow metal cylinder with vertical ribs from the large center container using the right hand and places it into the orange cart-like container on the right
f006_w004_bulk_material.move_ribbed_cylinder_to_metal_table: a worker lifts a hollow metal cylinder with vertical ribs from the large center container using the right hand and places it on the adjacent silver metal table
f006_w004_bulk_material.lift_ribbed_cylinder_from_bulk_container: a worker lifts a hollow metal cylinder with vertical ribs from the large center container using the right hand

f006_w005_compression_molding.carry_and_align_silver_mold_on_press_tab: a worker carries a two-level silver mold with both hands onto the press table, pushes it under the cylindrical upper press tool, aligns its position, and supports it with the left hand
f006_w005_compression_molding.operate_blue_lower_control_lever: a worker reaches toward the blue lever-shaped control below the control panel, grips it, and moves it
